sizing_rule.note: Risk 3% per trade (up to 8% portfolio max) when system shows high expectancy (win rate ≥55% AND reward-to-risk ≥4:1). Reduce risk percentage when expectancy conditions not met. Based on Van Tharp expectancy framework.

source_rule_text: A trader should risk a higher percentage of portfolio per trade when system expectancy is high (win rate >50% AND reward-to-risk ratio ≥3:1), and a lower percentage when expectancy is lower.
